code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{streamxApi}from'../services/api';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function ReelsPage(){const[reels,setReels]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);useEffect(()=>{streamxApi.getMovieReels().then(res=>setReels(res.data||[])).catch(()=>setReels([])).finally(()=>setLoading(false));},[]);if(loading){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("main",{style:{paddingTop:'96px',padding:'96px 24px 24px'},children:"Loading reels..."});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("main",{style:{paddingTop:'96px',padding:'96px 24px 24px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{style:{marginBottom:'16px'},children:"Movie Reels"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{display:'grid',gridTemplateColumns:'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr))',gap:'16px'},children:reels.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("article",{style:{background:'#111',border:'1px solid #2a2a2a',borderRadius:'12px',overflow:'hidden'},children:[item.poster&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:item.poster,alt:item.title,style:{width:'100%',height:'280px',objectFit:'cover'}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{padding:'12px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{style:{margin:'0 0 6px 0'},children:item.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{style:{margin:0,color:'#b5b5b5',fontSize:'0.9rem'},children:[item.year," \u2022 ",item.genre]})]})]},item.id))})]});}
